title: Inventory Overlay
description: This mod displays your inventory directly on the HUD without needing to open it.
body:
# Now with Resource Pack Compatibility! (See below) ![Inventory Overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2d5bdcfc242dbbf7ad9605a53453b66d82c878f_0.webp) **Inventory Overlay** is a simple utility mod designed to keep you informed of your resources without needing to open your inventory screen. It renders a clean, customizable grid of your main inventory slots directly on your game interface.
FEATURES
Live HUD DisplaySee your 27 main inventory slots (excluding the hotbar) at all times
Toggleable VisibilityEasily show or hide the overlay with a single keypress
Dynamic PositioningChoose where the overlay sits on your screen using an anchor system
Custom TransparencyAdjust the background opacity to suit your visual preference
Shine AnimationA sleek, 45-degree white line slides across newly occupied slots to instantly notify you when an item enters an empty slot
Resource Pack CompatibleCustom resource packs that retexture the hotbar are automatically reflected
HOW TO USE
Simply press ![I](https://img.shields.io/badge/I-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff) to toggle the visibility of the overlay.
CONFIGURATION
If you have Mod Menu installed, you can customize your experience:
Horizontal AnchorAlign the overlay to the Left, Center, or Right of your screen
Vertical AnchorAlign the overlay to the Top, Center, or Bottom
X & Y Offsets (px)Fine-tune the position with pixel-perfect adjustments
Container Alpha (%)Control the background transparency
REQUIREMENTS
- Fabric Loader - Fabric API - Cloth Config API (1.21.x) - YetAnotherConfigLib (26.x) - Mod Menu (recommended for easy in-game configuration)
CLIENT-SIDE ONLY
All functionality is done client-side and is compatible with vanilla servers.
FREE & OPEN SOURCE
This is a completely free project. I'm not asking for donations or "buy me a coffee" contributions. If you enjoy the mod, the best way to support it is by: - Leaving a rating/review - Sharing it with friends - Reporting any bugs you find
GALLERY
Shine Animation ![Shine Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5096313b7b1b0bad8e10880fe00336adf226c75a.gif) Vanilla / Gui's HUD & UI Edition / Jirniy's Pink HUD ![Vanilla / Gui's HUD & UI Edition / Jirniy's Pink HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d9f27614dd39b6c52abcebbdc8f2bff65a73b85.gif)
